subcodes.title: Words to editors of Star of the West, spoken on 1912-05-01
subcodes.first_line: Your services are acceptable. You have labored much. These labors are productive
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @newspapers and the media; publications, @compassion; kindness, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all, @non-participation in politics
